zh.lifeSummary: 當Rhiwallon ap Cynfyn於大約1020年出生在威爾士時，他的父親Cynfyn ap Gwerystan of Powys41歲，母親Angharad ferch Maredudd40歲。他於大約1050年與Faelis ferch Llywellyn of Wales在英國威爾斯波斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1070年在英國威爾斯蒙格莫利夏爾享年51歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Rhiwallon ap Cynfyn于大约1020年出生在威尔士时，他的父亲Cynfyn ap Gwerystan of Powys41岁，母亲Angharad ferch Maredudd40岁。他于大约1050年与Faelis ferch Llywellyn of Wales在英国威尔斯波斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1070年在英国威尔斯蒙格莫利夏爾享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch: occupational name for a cobbler.
Slovenian: nickname for a talkative person, from lapati ‘to babble’, or a topographic name from dialect lap ‘abyss’. Compare Lapp 4.

variants.name: Lapp
meanings: German, English, and Dutch: from Middle High German and Middle English lappe, Middle Dutch lap ‘cloth, patch, rag’, a metonymic occupational name for a mender of clothes or shoes, or a nickname given to someone who wore ragged clothes or garments with loose folds, flaps, or hanging sleeves, or who had fleshy folds of skin on his face, neck, or body.

German: nickname for a simple-minded person, from Middle Low German lappe ‘fool’. This surname (in any of the two possible senses; see also 1 above) is also found in France (mainly Alsace, also Lorraine).
English: nickname from Anglo-Norman French lappe ‘burdock’, perhaps for someone with a prickly character.

en.lifeSummary: When Rhiwallon ap Cynfyn was born about 1020, in Wales, his father, Cynfyn ap Gwerystan of Powys, was 41 and his mother, Angharad ferch Maredudd, was 40. He married Faelis ferch Llywellyn of Wales about 1050, in Powys, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1070, in Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rhiwallon ap Cynfyn est né environ 1020, à Galles, son père, Cynfyn ap Gwerystan of Powys, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Angharad ferch Maredudd, avait 40 ans. Il a épousé Faelis ferch Llywellyn of Wales environ 1050, à Powys, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1070, à Montgomeryshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Rhiwallon ap Cynfyn um 1020 in Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Cynfyn ap Gwerystan of Powys 41 und seine Mutter Angharad ferch Maredudd 40. Er hat um 1050 in Powys, Wales, United Kingdom Faelis ferch Llywellyn of Wales geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1070 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Rhiwallon ap Cynfyn è nato il circa 1020 nel Galles, il suo padre, Cynfyn ap Gwerystan of Powys, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Angharad ferch Maredudd, aveva 40 anni. Lui sposato Faelis ferch Llywellyn of Wales circa 1050, nel Powys, Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1070, nel Montgomeryshire, Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Rhiwallon ap Cynfynが約1020年にウェールズで生まれた時，父Cynfyn ap Gwerystan of Powysは41歳，母Angharad ferch Mareduddは40歳であった。約1050年にイギリスウェールズポウイスでFaelis ferch Llywellyn of Walesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1070年にイギリスウェールズモントゴメリシュアイアで51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Rhiwallon ap Cynfyn(이)가 대략 1020년 웨일스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Cynfyn ap Gwerystan of Powys(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Angharad ferch Maredudd(은)는 40세였다. 그는 대략 1050년 영국 웨일스 파우이스에서 Faelis ferch Llywellyn of Wales(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1070년 영국 웨일스 몽고머이실르에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.Mechain, Montgomeryshire, Wales: Montgomeryshire, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom
mg.Powys, Wales: Powys, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Rhiwallon ap Cynfyn nasceu aproximadamente 1020, em Gales, seu pai, Cynfyn ap Gwerystan of Powys, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Angharad ferch Maredudd, tinha 40 anos. Ele casou-se com Faelis ferch Llywellyn of Wales aproximadamente 1050, em Powys, Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1070, em Montgomeryshire, Gales, United Kingdom, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rhiwallon ap Cynfyn родился около 1020 г. в местности Уэльс, его отцу по имени Cynfyn ap Gwerystan of Powys было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Angharad ferch Maredudd, 40. Он женился на женщине по имени Faelis ferch Llywellyn of Wales около 1050 г. в местности поуис, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1070 г. в местности монтгомиришир, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 51 год.

sm.from 1063 to 1070: mai le 1063 e o'o I le 1070

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Rhiwallon ap Cynfyn nació aproximadamente 1020, en Gales, su papá, Cynfyn ap Gwerystan of Powys, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Angharad ferch Maredudd, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Faelis ferch Llywellyn of Wales aproximadamente 1050, en Powys, Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1070, en Montgomeryshire, Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 51 años.
